---
title: "R Notebook"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
```

```{r}
trenn <- read_csv('Treening.csv')
ggplot(data = trenn, aes(x = hours, y = loss, color=prog))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="lm", formula=y~poly(x,2)) +
  theme_bw()
#asd
#eee
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = trenn, aes(x = hours)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.2, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  labs(x = "Hours", y = "Count", title = "Histogram of Training Hours")+
  theme_bw()

```
